overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a dusk walk through Night City. The player passes a spice vendor, crosses a street, and walks under an elevated highway with dynamic neon lighting while futuristic traffic streams by.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial sidewalk with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk approaching a street vendor with colorful goods

notable_agents.action: street vendor sitting behind cart with baskets of colorful spices

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated '2077 STORE' signage and holographic advertisements
massive concrete and steel highway structure spanning across the street ahead
street cart with red umbrella and multiple baskets of colorful goods
large digital screens with glowing advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic city sidewalk at dusk, approaching a street vendor. The elevated highway overpass looms ahead while neon signs illuminate the commercial buildings. The vendor sits beside a cart displaying colorful spices in baskets.

events.description: camera moves close to vendor cart to examine colorful goods in baskets
stepping onto yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: examining the vendor's colorful goods up close, then turning and crossing the street toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with headlights on approaching the intersection

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with yellow painted stripes and red 'WAIT' text
futuristic pedestrian signal showing red hand symbol

segments.scene_description: Moving close to inspect the vendor's colorful spice baskets, then proceeding to cross the wide street via a yellow crosswalk. The elevated highway structure draws closer as futuristic cars approach on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with dynamic neon lighting

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at towering building with holographic advertisements
overpass lighting shifts to purple as walking past Burrito food stall

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass, briefly looking up at the architecture, passing food stalls and benches

notable_agents.action: person standing at Burrito food stall counter with purple neon lighting

entered.detail: food vendor stall with 'BURRITO' neon sign and purple interior lighting
large pink neon sign with 'KENJI' text on glass building facade
dynamic colored LED strips lining the underside of the highway structure

segments.scene_description: Now walking beneath the massive elevated highway, sheltered from the open sky. The underside of the overpass glows with shifting neon colors—red and purple. A Burrito stall with purple lighting appears on the left while the camera briefly tilts up to admire the towering glass buildings with holographic ads.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit corridor under highway with streaming traffic and vendor carts

events.description: overpass neon lights cycle through blue, green, and pink hues
approaching another street vendor cart with red umbrella

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway under color-changing neon lights, approaching a food vendor ahead

notable_agents.action: stream of futuristic cars with headlights on driving past under the overpass
vendor standing at food cart with umbrella waiting for customers

entered.detail: mobile food cart with red umbrella and illuminated menu display
low concrete dividers separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Continuing the walk under the elevated highway as the neon lighting shifts through various colors—blue, green, pink, and back to red. Futuristic cars stream by on the right with headlights glowing. The camera approaches another food vendor cart with a red umbrella set up under the overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling commercial sidewalk at dusk into the neon-drenched shadows of a massive highway overpass. It begins by approaching a street vendor with colorful spice baskets under the glow of city signs before moving across a wide street via a yellow crosswalk. As the camera passes beneath the towering concrete structure of the elevated highway, the open sky vanishes and is replaced by shifting red and purple neon lights that illuminate a nearby burrito stall and towering holographic advertisements. The scene then progresses further under the overpass, where the lighting cycles through blue, green, and pink hues as futuristic cars stream by with glowing headlights. Finally, the movement continues through this vibrant subterranean corridor toward another food vendor cart sheltered by a red umbrella.
